name: Numeric Range Comparison Without Minimum Check
description: The product checks that a numeric value does not exceed a maximum but fails to verify it meets a minimum, allowing negative or unexpectedly small values (especially with signed integers) to bypass validation and cause buffer underflows or incorrect calculations.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[numeric_input] passes through CONTROL[max_check] that validates upper bound but lacks a CONTROL[min_check] for the lower bound, allowing negative or underflow values to reach STORAGE[buffer] or TRANSFORM[calculation] and cause out-of-bounds access
